title: eulophia callichroma
intro: Eulophia callichroma, also known as the "Green Bird's Nest Orchid", is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Eulophia callichroma include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as supporting immune function and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
